milestoneTitle: Phase M9.6 — fixes: (a) Learn DnD long-press wasn't firing on iPhone because the 8px slop was being consumed by natural finger tremor in the 350ms hold window. Bumped LEARN_LONG_PRESS_SLOP to 14px and switched cancellation to a direction-aware rule — only a clearly horizontal movement commits to swipe, only a clearly vertical one commits to scroll, anything ambiguous stays pending so the timer can still fire. Drag-in scale bumped to 1.04 with a stronger elevation shadow and a brief pulse keyframe so the state change reads at a glance. (b) Pin-to-learn submit looked like it did nothing because the inline "Pinned ✓" status was being hidden the instant the details panel closed. Details auto-close now waits 1.8s so the inline status is visible; a bottom-center learn-toast fires in parallel as a viewport-level confirmation (toast Undo button hides when no onUndo callback is passed).
